summary: After completing three days of intensive training under the guidance of Alley Boss, Choi Yoon begins his 'Bronze Rank' challenge to support his daughter Jisoo's surgery. He surprises his viewers and his mentor with his newfound combat efficiency and rapid climb through the rankings. As he secures multiple consecutive wins, he faces an unexpected opponent from his past, the former guild master of the Black Skull Guild.
key_moments: Choi Yoon completes his intensive training and prepares for his ranked match challenge.
Choi Yoon begins his stream and secures several clean, decisive victories, quickly climbing the rankings.
Choi Yoon encounters his next opponent, whom he realizes is the former guild master of the Black Skull Guild.
